ast.name: log
ast.source: More sync work is still queued, so Light-LiveSync will continue with another sync pass automatically.
ast.target: 仍有更多同步任务在队列中，因此 Light-LiveSync 将自动继续执行下一轮同步。

ast.name: log
ast.source: First upload completed against an empty remote vault; skipped pulling this device's own uploaded documents.
ast.target: 首次上传已完成，目标为一个空的远程保险库；已跳过拉取本设备自身上传的文档。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Credentials restored for this Obsidian session.
ast.target: 本次 Obsidian 会话的凭据已恢复。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Credentials restored automatically from this device.
ast.target: 凭据已从本设备自动恢复。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Manual sync will pull the existing remote vault before uploading this additional device's local files.
ast.target: 手动同步将在上传本设备本地文件之前，先拉取现有的远程保险库。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Session credential cache self-check passed with dummy credentials.
ast.target: 会话凭据缓存自检通过，使用了虚拟凭据。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Prepared session credential cache reload check with dummy credentials.
ast.target: 已准备使用虚拟凭据进行会话凭据缓存重载检查。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Session credential cache reload check passed with dummy credentials.
ast.target: 会话凭据缓存重载检查通过，使用了虚拟凭据。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Prepared real session credential reload check without writing plaintext credentials to plugin data.
ast.target: 已准备进行真实会话凭据重载检查，未将明文凭据写入插件数据。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Real session credential reload check passed without exposing plaintext credentials.
ast.target: 真实会话凭据重载检查通过，未暴露明文凭据。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Previous sync was interrupted before it could finish.
ast.target: 上一次同步在完成前被中断。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Background worker file was not found; using the built-in worker source instead.
ast.target: 未找到后台工作线程文件；将改用内置的工作线程源。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Password for the CouchDB username shown in settings. The plugin uses it to read and write the vault database.
ast.target: 设置中显示的 CouchDB 用户名对应的密码。插件使用它来读写保险库数据库。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shared encryption passphrase for this vault. Use the same value on every device so synced files can be decrypted.
ast.target: 此保险库的共享加密密码。请在每台设备上使用相同的值，以便同步的文件可以被解密。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shared passphrase for the setup URI and encrypted vault sync.
ast.target: 用于设置 URI 和加密保险库同步的共享密码。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Setup URI loaded. Edit it only if you need to paste a different code.
ast.target: 设置 URI 已加载。仅在需要粘贴不同代码时才编辑它。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Paste the obsidian://setuplivesync link, or paste the terminal output that contains it.
ast.target: 粘贴 obsidian://setuplivesync 链接，或粘贴包含它的终端输出。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Treat this like a temporary invite code. It is encrypted, but anyone with the URI and passphrase can connect to the same sync database.
ast.target: 请将其视为临时邀请码。它是加密的，但任何拥有 URI 和密码的人都可以连接到同一个同步数据库。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Start here. Use the CouchDB fields from your setup script, or import an existing Self-hosted LiveSync setup URI.
ast.target: 从这里开始。使用您设置脚本中的 CouchDB 字段，或导入现有的自托管 LiveSync 设置 URI。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Saved credentials could not be opened automatically on this device. Update them once so sync can continue without a recurring prompt.
ast.target: 保存的凭据无法在此设备上自动打开。请更新一次，以便同步可以继续而无需重复提示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Encrypted sync is required. Add the shared E2EE passphrase used by your other devices before sending or applying files.
ast.target: 需要加密同步。请在发送或应用文件之前，添加您的其他设备使用的共享 E2EE 密码。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Setup is saved, but this device has not checked the remote database yet. Verify the credentials, database, and sync parameters before syncing files.
ast.target: 设置已保存，但此设备尚未检查远程数据库。请在同步文件前验证凭据、数据库和同步参数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The current sync is still in progress. New sync requests are folded into the next run instead of starting another one.
ast.target: 当前同步仍在进行中。新的同步请求将被合并到下一次运行中，而不是启动另一个。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: No action is needed right now. Live changes are batched, periodic sync remains as a fallback, and conflicts are handled with automatic text merges plus backups.
ast.target: 现在无需任何操作。实时更改会被批量处理，定期同步作为备用，冲突通过自动文本合并加备份来处理。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Generate an encrypted setup URI for a phone, tablet, or another desktop. The remote database must already be initialized here; the new device only imports the URI and syncs.
ast.target: 为手机、平板电脑或其他桌面设备生成加密的设置 URI。远程数据库必须已在此处初始化；新设备只需导入 URI 并同步。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Leave on for the mobile-safe app request transport. Turn off only if a specific server or proxy setup works better with standard fetch.
ast.target: 保持开启以用于移动安全的应用程序请求传输。仅当特定服务器或代理设置使用标准 fetch 效果更好时才关闭。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where your CouchDB server lives, for example host:5984 or https://host:5984. This is never hardwired.
ast.target: 您的 CouchDB 服务器所在位置，例如 host:5984 或 https://host:5984。此值不会硬编码。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The vault database to create or reuse on the server. CouchDB needs lowercase names, so this field is normalized automatically.
ast.target: 要在服务器上创建或重用的保险库数据库。CouchDB 需要小写名称，因此此字段会自动规范化。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The CouchDB account that can read, write, and create the selected database.
ast.target: 可以读取、写入和创建所选数据库的 CouchDB 帐户。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional advanced proxy headers, one per line as Name: value. Leave blank for a normal CouchDB server.
ast.target: 可选的高级代理头，每行一个，格式为 Name: value。对于普通 CouchDB 服务器，请留空。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Recommended. Sync will not send or apply vault content unless the shared encryption passphrase is available.
ast.target: 推荐。除非共享加密密码可用，否则同步不会发送或应用保险库内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Recommended fallback. Catches changes missed while a device was asleep, offline, or backgrounded.
ast.target: 推荐的备用方案。捕获设备休眠、离线或后台运行时错过的更改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Plain-language setup and sync progress is kept here so you can tell what the plugin is doing without watching short popups.
ast.target: 此处保存了通俗易懂的设置和同步进度，以便您无需关注短暂弹窗即可了解插件正在做什么。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: After a file uploads successfully, Light-LiveSync keeps a small encrypted version marker that reuses the same CouchDB content chunks. It keeps up to 10 versions per file or 90 days, whichever is smaller.
ast.target: 文件上传成功后，Light-LiveSync 会保留一个小型加密版本标记，该标记会重用相同的 CouchDB 内容块。它为每个文件保留最多 10 个版本或 90 天，以较短者为准。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Start typing a vault path, or use the currently open file.
ast.target: 开始输入保险库路径，或使用当前打开的文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Load previous synced versions for the selected file. Restoring a version backs up the current file first.
ast.target: 加载所选文件的先前同步版本。恢复版本会先备份当前文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shows deleted files that still have saved encrypted versions in CouchDB. Restoring a file puts it back in the vault and queues it for sync.
ast.target: 显示在 CouchDB 中仍有保存的加密版本的已删除文件。恢复文件会将其放回保险库并将其排入同步队列。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 添加保险库加密密码短语

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 步骤 1. 连接此保险库

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Step 2. Create or verify the CouchDB database
ast.target: 步骤 2. 创建或验证 CouchDB 数据库

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 步骤 4. 添加另一台设备

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Light-LiveSync] Background worker unavailable; using main-thread push builder.
ast.target: [Light-LiveSync] 后台工作线程不可用；正在使用主线程推送构建器。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Copy was not available. Select the URI text and copy it manually.
ast.target: 复制不可用。请选择 URI 文本并手动复制。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: CouchDB setup command copied. Fill any placeholder secrets before running it.
ast.target: CouchDB 设置命令已复制。运行前请填写任何占位符密钥。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Light-LiveSync credentials are ready on this device.
ast.target: 此设备上的 Light-LiveSync 凭据已就绪。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Saved credentials could not be opened automatically. Update saved credentials once to refresh this device.
ast.target: 无法自动打开已保存的凭据。请更新一次已保存的凭据以刷新此设备。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Credentials are ready on this device.
ast.target: 此设备上的凭据已就绪。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Connect CouchDB before checking the connection.
ast.target: 请在检查连接前连接 CouchDB。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 会话凭据缓存自检通过。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Session credential cache reload check prepared. Reload Obsidian, then run Finish session credential cache reload check.
ast.target: 会话凭据缓存重载检查已准备。请重新加载 Obsidian，然后运行完成会话凭据缓存重载检查。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Session credential cache reload check passed.
ast.target: 会话凭据缓存重载检查通过。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Real credential reload check prepared. Reload Obsidian, then run Finish real credential reload check.
ast.target: 真实凭据重载检查已准备。请重新加载 Obsidian，然后运行完成真实凭据重载检查。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Real credential reload check passed. Credentials restored for this Obsidian session.
ast.target: 真实凭据重载检查通过。此 Obsidian 会话的凭据已恢复。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This device was added by setup URI. Initialize the remote database from the original device instead.
ast.target: 此设备是通过设置 URI 添加的。请改为从原始设备初始化远程数据库。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The CouchDB server domain or address configured on your server-side CouchDB instance. Use host:port or https://domain; http:// is added when omitted.
ast.target: 您服务器端 CouchDB 实例上配置的 CouchDB 服务器域名或地址。使用 host:port 或 https://domain；省略时会添加 http://。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The CouchDB database name configured on the server-side CouchDB instance for this vault.
ast.target: 服务器端 CouchDB 实例上为此保险库配置的 CouchDB 数据库名称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shared vault encryption passphrase. Use the same value on every device so synced files can be decrypted.
ast.target: 共享的保险库加密密码短语。请在每台设备上使用相同的值，以便解密同步的文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The CouchDB database user configured on the server-side CouchDB instance for this vault. If this is a new user, fill the admin_username/admin_password placeholders in the copied server-side command.
ast.target: 服务器端 CouchDB 实例上为此保险库配置的 CouchDB 数据库用户。如果是新用户，请在复制的服务器端命令中填写 admin_username/admin_password 占位符。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The CouchDB database password configured on the server-side CouchDB instance for this vault. It is placed into the encrypted setup URI; it is not used as the CouchDB admin password.
ast.target: 服务器端 CouchDB 实例上为此保险库配置的 CouchDB 数据库密码。它被放入加密的设置 URI 中；它不被用作 CouchDB 管理员密码。

ast.name: label
ast.target: 保险库 E2EE 密码短语

ast.name: message
ast.source: This device was added by setup URI. Initialize the remote database from the original device instead.
ast.target: 此设备是通过设置 URI 添加的。请改为从原始设备初始化远程数据库。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Saved credentials could not be opened automatically. Update saved credentials once before syncing.
ast.target: 无法自动打开已保存的凭据。请在同步前更新一次已保存的凭据。

ast.name: message
ast.source: E2EE is required. Update saved credentials or import the vault E2EE passphrase before syncing.
ast.target: 需要 E2EE。请在同步前更新已保存的凭据或导入保险库 E2EE 密码短语。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Device appears offline. Automatic sync is paused until connectivity returns.
ast.target: 设备似乎离线。自动同步已暂停，直到恢复连接。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Runtime check passed. Light-LiveSync is loaded and ready for background sync.
ast.target: 运行时检查通过。Light-LiveSync 已加载并准备好进行后台同步。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Runtime capability check passed. Required desktop/mobile browser APIs are available.
ast.target: 运行时能力检查通过。所需的桌面/移动浏览器 API 可用。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 准备 CouchDB 设置命令

ast.name: name
ast.source: Generate setup URI for another device
ast.target: 为另一台设备生成设置 URI

ast.name: name
ast.target: 运行会话凭据缓存自检

ast.name: name
ast.source: Prepare session credential cache reload check
ast.target: 准备会话凭据缓存重载检查

ast.name: name
ast.source: Finish session credential cache reload check
ast.target: 完成会话凭据缓存重载检查

ast.name: name
ast.target: 准备真实凭据重载检查

ast.name: name
ast.target: 完成真实凭据重载检查

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将拉取应用到暂存文件夹

ast.name: text
ast.source: Update the private values used for CouchDB and encrypted vault sync. These are saved encrypted in plugin data and stay available on this device after setup.
ast.target: 更新用于 CouchDB 和加密保险库同步的私有值。这些值以加密形式保存在插件数据中，并在设置后保留在此设备上。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 准备 CouchDB 设置命令

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enter the Server Domain, Database Name, Database User, and Database Password configured in your server-side CouchDB instance. These values are used to generate the setup URI that this plugin imports.
ast.target: 输入在服务器端 CouchDB 实例中配置的服务器域名、数据库名称、数据库用户和数据库密码。这些值用于生成此插件导入的设置 URI。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Run the copied command directly on the CouchDB host, such as the server terminal, SSH session, or Docker container console. If creating a new database user or database, fill in the optional CouchDB admin variables in that command before running it.
ast.target: 直接在 CouchDB 主机上运行复制的命令，例如服务器终端、SSH 会话或 Docker 容器控制台。如果创建新的数据库用户或数据库，请在运行前在该命令中填写可选的 CouchDB 管理员变量。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Import a setup link and enter the shared E2EE passphrase for this vault.
ast.target: 导入设置链接并输入此保险库的共享 E2EE 密码。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Copy this encrypted setup URI to the new device. On the new device, choose Use setup URI and enter the same shared E2EE passphrase when asked.
ast.target: 将此加密的设置 URI 复制到新设备。在新设备上，选择“使用设置 URI”，并在提示时输入相同的共享 E2EE 密码。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This does not create a database. It connects the new device to the database already initialized by this device.
ast.target: 这不会创建数据库。它将新设备连接到此设备已初始化的数据库。

ast.name: text
ast.source: A low-noise vault sync setup for CouchDB. Defaults favor encrypted sync, bounded batches, automatic text merges, and recovery backups.
ast.target: 一个低噪音的 CouchDB 保险库同步设置。默认设置倾向于加密同步、有界批次、自动文本合并和恢复备份。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Defaults are tuned for slow or unreliable connections: changes wait briefly, upload in bounded batches, and retry later after failures.
ast.target: 默认设置针对缓慢或不可靠的连接进行了调整：更改会短暂等待，以有界批次上传，并在失败后稍后重试。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No recent setup or sync messages yet.
ast.target: 暂无最近的设置或同步消息。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No recently deleted files with saved versions were found.
ast.target: 未找到最近删除的、带有已保存版本的文件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Looking for recently deleted files with saved versions...
ast.target: 正在查找最近删除的、带有已保存版本的文件...

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enter a vault file path, or open a file and use the open-file shortcut.
ast.target: 输入保险库文件路径，或打开文件并使用打开文件快捷方式。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Choose a file and find versions when you need to recover an older copy.
ast.target: 选择一个文件，并在需要恢复旧副本时查找版本。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Use this when a file was deleted and you want to restore the latest saved version.
ast.target: 当文件被删除且您想恢复最新保存的版本时使用此功能。
